name: Linear Algebra — Linear Maps
description: Linear map T: V→W preserves + and scalar mult. Kernel, image. Rank, nullity. Rank-nullity theorem. Isomorphism when bijective.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Linear map\nT av+bw = aTv + bTw"]
    D2["Def: Kernel\nker T = T⁻¹0"]
    D3["Def: Image\nim T = T V"]
    D4["Def: Rank\nrank T = dim im T"]
    D5["Def: Nullity\nnull T = dim ker T"]
    T1["Thm: Rank-nullity\ndim V = rank + null"]
    T2["Thm: T iso ⟺\nker=0 and im=W"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D2 --> D5
    D3 --> D4
    D4 --> T1
    D5 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D3 --> T2
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1,T2 theorem
